load_restriction: BLOCK load until PII masked — compliance sign-off required

masking_plan.masking_strategy: Pseudonymisation — replace with consistent fake name per customer_id
Redaction — store only last 4 digits (UIDAI guideline)
Format-preserving tokenisation (PAN structure preserved, value replaced)
Redaction — store only last 4 digits (UIDAI guideline)
Mask or anonymize before sharing externally.

compliance_notes: PAN numbers: RBI circular 2023-09 requires format-preserving tokenisation
Aadhaar: UIDAI mandate — only last 4 digits may be stored
All Restricted data requires DLP tool scan before prod load
student_judgment: No, we should not always run the LLM on every column because it increases cost and latency. The best approach is a hybrid model: use regex first for fast, low-cost detection and invoke the LLM only for columns that remain unclassified or have low confidence, since the compliance risk of missing PII is much higher than the additional LLM cost.
